scripts.dev:web: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/electron"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.dev:ios: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend -- --host"
scripts.build:ios: npm run build -w packages/shared && cd packages/frontend && npx vite build --mode ios
scripts.sync:ios: npm run build:ios && cd packages/ios && npx cap sync ios
scripts.open:ios: cd packages/ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.build:electron-frontend: npm run build -w packages/shared && cd packages/frontend && npx vite build --mode electron
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:electron-frontend && npm run make -w packages/electron -- --platform=darwin
scripts.package:mac:arm64: npm run build:electron-frontend && npm run make -w packages/electron -- --platform=darwin --arch=arm64
scripts.package:mac:x64: npm run build:electron-frontend && npm run make -w packages/electron -- --platform=darwin --arch=x64
